// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.CodeDom.Compiler;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

namespace TestApp.Mappers;

/// <summary>
/// Source generated mapper from <c>Order</c> to <c>OrderSummary</c>.
/// </summary>
partial class OrderSummaryMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Order, global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Order? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            ItemCount = source.Items.Count(),
            Summary = source.Description + " (" + source.Status + ")",
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Order source, global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.Id = source.Id;
        destination.ItemCount = source.Items.Count();
        destination.Summary = source.Description + " (" + source.Status + ")";
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Order, global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            ItemCount = src.Items.Count(),
            Summary = src.Description + " (" + src.Status + ")",
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.OrderSummary> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Order> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
